name: Iru (formerly Kandji)
description: Monitor Iru (formerly Kandji) MDM device compliance and management for endpoint security

config.setupInstructions:
## Setup Iru (formerly Kandji) Integration

1. Sign in to your Iru (formerly Kandji) admin console
2. Go to **Settings** then **Access** then **API Token**
3. Click **Add token** and give it a name like "CompAI Integration"
4. Grant the token the **Device List** permission
5. Copy the API token (it is only shown once)
6. Note your Iru (formerly Kandji) subdomain from your URL (e.g. "mycompany" from mycompany.clients.us-1.kandji.io)
7. Paste the API token and subdomain into CompAI

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies Iru-managed devices are compliant and have agents installed

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists all Iru-managed devices for device inventory
